content.query:
SELECT 
* 
FROM  OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'csv',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS [RESULT];

SELECT 
* 
FROM  OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/part-00000-d59fed56-862c-4598-87db-1acc61b1c21b-c000.snappy.parquet',
    FORMAT = 'parquet'
) AS [APPLE];

SELECT 
* 
FROM  OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'csv',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS apple_sales
where quarter = 'Q1';

CREATE DATABASE vin_db;

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE MyExternalSource
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer'
);

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT CsvFileFormat
WITH(
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS(
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
        STRING_DELIMITER = '"',
        FIRST_ROW = 2
    )
);


-- create or register your external file as a table
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.SalesData
(
    OrderID VARCHAR(20),
    OrderDate DATE,
    Year INT,
    Quarter VARCHAR(5),
    Month VARCHAR(15),
    Country VARCHAR(50),
    Continent VARCHAR(50),
    City VARCHAR(50),
    ProductName VARCHAR(100),
    ProductCategory VARCHAR(50),
    SubCategory VARCHAR(50),
    Color VARCHAR(30),
    UnitPrice DECIMAL(10,2),
    Quantity INT,
    Discount INT,
    DiscountedPrice DECIMAL(10,2),
    FinalPrice DECIMAL(10,2),
    Currency VARCHAR(10),
    ExchangeRate INT,
    Revenue DECIMAL(18,2),
    SalesChannel VARCHAR(50),
    PaymentMethod VARCHAR(50),
    CustomerType VARCHAR(50),
    AgeGroup VARCHAR(20),
    ReturnReason VARCHAR(100),
    Rating DECIMAL(2,1),
    OrderStatus VARCHAR(20)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = MyExternalSource,
    FILE_FORMAT = CsvFileFormat
);

SELECT * FROM dbo.SalesData;
